role: This directory provides the prompt policy and construction infrastructure for the ArchSpine system, including budget calculation, trimming, diagnostics, and type definitions.
responsibility: The modules in this directory collectively enable prompt artifact assembly by resolving policy tiers, calculating token/line budgets, trimming context and rule blocks, generating diagnostics, and defining typed constants and interfaces for consistent prompt generation across different task modes.

children.role: Orchestration function that assembles source prompt artifacts by coordinating policy resolution, budget calculation, structural skeleton compaction, content trimming, and diagnostic generation.
Infrastructure facade for resolving and computing prompt token budgets based on task mode, validation policy, and source artifacts.
Centralized configuration module defining typed constants and budget profiles for the ArchSpine prompt policy system.
Diagnostic utility for analyzing rule block retention and dependency selection in prompt relevance processing within the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
Infrastructure utility for parsing and validating typed configuration enums from raw string input.
Infrastructure policy resolver providing default and overridable prompt tier and validation policy for task modes.
Core text formatting and trimming utility module for prompt construction in the ArchSpine system.
Central TypeScript type definition module for prompt generation, validation, diagnostic configuration, and generation strategy within the ArchSpine LLM orchestration system.
